payload.answer: You concluded that Brain is the durable source of truth for personal memory, and Cognee is only a rebuildable projection/index derived from Brain—not the authoritative memory store.

entity_resolution.reason: Query explicitly asks about Brain and Cognee conclusions; unrelated Slack, family, and Sam preference records are out of scope.

memory_cards.statement: Brain should be treated as the source-of-truth personal memory database, while Cognee should be treated as a rebuildable projection or index derived from Brain rather than the durable authority.

details: Answered only the queried Brain/Cognee scope.
Excluded unrelated Slack intake, family facts, and Sam preference records.

raw_text: {"intent":"recall","decision":"answer_from_memory","memory_cards":[{"kind":"conclusion","statement":"Brain should be treated as the source-of-truth personal memory database, while Cognee should be treated as a rebuildable projection or index derived from Brain rather than the durable authority.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Brain","type":"system","role":"source_of_truth"},{"name":"Cognee","type":"system","role":"rebuildable_projection"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Brain","predicate":"is","object":"source-of-truth personal memory database"},{"subject":"Cognee","predicate":"is","object":"rebuildable projection derived from Brain"},{"subject":"Cognee","predicate":"should_not_be_treated_as","object":"durable authority"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"resolved","entity_id":null,"reason":"Query explicitly asks about Brain and Cognee conclusions; unrelated Slack, family, and Sam preference records are out of scope."},"conflict_classification":"none","answer":"You concluded that Brain is the durable source of truth for personal memory, and Cognee is only a rebuildable projection/index derived from Brain—not the authoritative memory store.","citations":["Brain DB source-of-truth conclusion","Cognee rebuildable projection"],"repair_options":[],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Answered only the queried Brain/Cognee scope.","Excluded unrelated Slack intake, family facts, and Sam preference records."]}}
